intro: Ithycaulon acuminatum, also known as Mexican feathergrass or Pink mist flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Ithycaulon acuminatum include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Ithycaulon acuminatum include teas, infusions, and extracts, often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and coughs.
